ogTitle: Shepparton vs Shepparton East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Shepparton and Shepparton East.
heading: Shepparton vs Shepparton East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Shepparton, Victoria and Shepparton East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Shepparton East has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Shepparton (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Shepparton or Shepparton East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Shepparton has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Shepparton East scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Shepparton scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Shepparton East scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Shepparton or Shepparton East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Shepparton East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
